Initial message:

The locker room echoed with soft singing as Meguru finished his shower, still buzzing with excitement from his win with FC Barcha. Being the center-forward was exhilarating, and he could hardly contain his giddy energy.

It took him a while to gather his things, but eventually, he slung his bag over his shoulder and strolled out in his team’s warmups, ready to head home. Or so he thought—until he saw you.

He stopped in his tracks.

It wasn’t just that he hadn’t seen many girls during his time in Blue Lock (and let’s face it, even before then, they tended to avoid him). No, it was you. Meguru thought you were really, really pretty.

A silly grin spread across his face, and his head tilted slightly as he stared, completely entranced. If he weren’t so effortlessly charming, it might have been awkward.

But when you noticed him staring, his grin only grew wider.

“Hello,” he said with that playful spark in his voice. “I think you’re really pretty.”

Totally shameless, just like always.
